Video.summary: Watch this DIY video tutorial to learn How to make a Spring Wreath. Adding colorful spring wreaths to your home is a fabulous way to make your space blossom with very little effort. Follow along with this home decor craft tutorial to create a stunning and bright project. This DIY craft is easy to make, and you can use just about any fabric you would like. Get started on your own DIY wreath for the most cheerful of seasons!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath
FaveCrafts: How to Make a Spring Wreath

Video.summary: In today's video we'll be discussing the balancing act between art and life. From our personal struggles to solutions we cover it all! Sit back, relax and enjoy!!

Digital Painting - Frog Food: Balancing Art and Life - Speed Paint

Video.summary: Ready to start making perfect flower stems and friendship bracelets? This How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool guide shows you just how easy using this tool is. Plus, this is a great tool you can use for all different kinds of crafts that require a little extra twist. Whether you are making flowers and need a stem, or you are working with wire on some DIY jewelry projects, this tool can become your go to! This Sizzix tool is worth giving a try if you want to expand your craft tools collection!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool
FaveCrafts: How to Use the Sizzix Twist and Style Tool

The Crafty Chica: Handmade Journal

Video.summary: Alexis and Adam are in lifestyle shock: the arrival their son Hudson has meant that this formerly 'out and about' couple is now decidedly housebound but their 1980s kitchen just isn't happening anymore. It's neither practical nor beautiful so designer Samantha Pynn gives it an eco-friendly and stylish makeover. By taking out the dated metallic back-splash, lacquering their cabinets and updating the furnishings, Samantha converts an open kitchen and living area into a stunning space that is both functional for everyday use and glamorous enough for entertaining.
Video.title: Pure Design: Alexis & Adam's Kitchen

Image.alt: Pure Design: Alexis & Adam's Kitchen
Pure Design: Alexis & Adam's Kitchen

Video.summary: Learn how to make a pretty pendant charm necklace out of a simple wine cork!

FaveCrafts: Pretty Pendant Charm Necklace Wine Cork Craft

Video.summary: Subtle spring accents, like this Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower branch, can add some lovely touches to your home. This free flower craft idea shows you how to make small tissue paper flowers and attach them to a branch for a realistic-looking faux flower. Once you create this cute DIY flower craft, you can add them to a vase, hang them on the wall, or combine them with other floral ideas for a unique DIY bouquet. These tissue paper cherry blossoms make excellent springtime decorations!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower
FaveCrafts: Cherry Blossom Tissue Paper Flower

Video.summary: "Learn how to make a Potted Faux Flower Craft as a DIY centerpiece for springtime, bridal showers, baby showers, and more! This video tutorial shows you how to make a faux flower as well as a vase for your brand new bloom. This easy die cut craft is perfect for spring decorating, and unlike real plants, this flower craft is low maintenance and can go anywhere in your home! Be sure to watch this DIY craft tutorial for a spring craft idea you'll love. "
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft
FaveCrafts: Potted Faux Flower Craft

Video.summary: Today we have a Very Special One of a Kind Custom Doll! Craft along with Froggy as she makes a Royal Wedding Made to Move Meghan Duchess of Sussex Custom Doll! From the Simply Fabulous Wedding Gown to a Royal Wedding Background we've got you covered! Happy Crafting
Video.title: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make CUSTOM "Made to Move" Royal Wedding Meghan Duchess of Sussex

Image.alt: My Froggy Stuff: How to Make CUSTOM "Made to Move" Royal Wedding Meghan Duchess of Sussex
My Froggy Stuff: How to Make CUSTOM "Made to Move" Royal Wedding Meghan Duchess of Sussex

Video.summary: This Coffee Filter Bouquet is a gorgeous paper flower tutorial for your big day. Make a DIY bridal bouquet out of coffee filters with this free crafting video. Combining dyed coffee filters and die cutting techniques, this forever flower bouquet is a charming and secretly cheap way to make a wedding bouquet. Consider making this homemade bouquet idea for a wedding, baby shower, or for spring accents in your home. You never have to worry about it wilting!
Video.title: FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet
FaveCrafts: Coffee Filter Bouquet
